text:
Once upon a time in a land not very different from our own, there lived a mischievous bunny named Bucky. Bucky was not like the other bunnies in the meadow. He was quick, cunning, and possessed a talent for getting into trouble—always finding himself in the most ridiculous situations.

One bright morning, after a particularly sunny day that sparked a wild idea in Bucky's tiny head, he donned an old, tattered hat that he fancied was a wizard's hat. He ran towards the crystal-clear lake, dancing around in circles, concocting his most outrageous scheme yet.

He sat down on the edge of the water, stared at his reflection long and hard, and then yelled, "Let there be chaos!" Flipping his hat onto his head, he shouted again, "And... sprinkle a little bit everywhere!"

So, he did. Bucky threw handfuls of shimmering, enchanted dust into the air, causing it to sparkle like
